### RANGE CONTAINS
Returns true if the first value contains the second (Lucene CONTAINS semantics). Supports (date_range, date), (date, date_range), (date_range, date_range), (date, date).

```esql
FROM employees
| WHERE RANGE_CONTAINS(hire_date, TO_DATE_RANGE("1985-02-01..1985-03-01"))
| KEEP emp_no, hire_date
| SORT emp_no
```
